items.title: fix(shared): bound ignore-file reads during workspace scans (#101429)
items.summary: fix(shared): bound ignore-file reads during workspace scans (#101429) * fix(shared): bound ignore-file reads during workspace scans * fix(shared): import bounded reader through infra policy wrapper * fix(shared): preserve chained-symlink ignore files while bounding reads * fix(shared): correct ignore-rules test calls and remove dead return * fix(shared): restore ignore matcher return value from addIgnoreRules * fix(shared): fail closed on oversized ignore files during scans * style(shared): format ignore-rules signature * test(shared): rename misleading under-cap ignore-file test * chore: retrigger CI for unrelated flaky run-with-env shutdown test * fix(shared): make oversized ignore-file exclusion terminal * test(shared): remove loadSkillsFromDir dependency for main compat * chore: retrigger dead-code scan after Periphery/Homebrew flake * fix(scans): fail closed on ignore read races * fix(scans): treat fail-closed ignore paths literally Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): preserve native ignore path semantics Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): bound ignore rule amplification Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): preserve case-insensitive fail-closed matching Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): preserve bounded ignore composition Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): satisfy matcher method binding lint Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): preserve ignore matcher case mode Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): keep matcher options internal Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 * fix(scans): require matcher case contract Co-authored-by: 陈宪彪0668000387 --------- Co-authored-by: Peter Steinberger Co-authored-by: Peter Steinberger

items.title: 1Password替Claude加上受控登入功能，AI代理能登入網站卻看不到密碼
items.summary: 1Password與Anthropic合作推出1Password for Claude，讓Claude執行瀏覽器任務時，可在使用者授權下登入網站，但密碼與一次性驗證碼不會提供給模型，也不會進入Claude的上下文、記憶或Anthropic系統。憑證仍由1Password保管，只在任務需要時使用。
